title: Player Title
description: Give you the ability to add a title under any player's username.
body:
This is a mod I made for my own SMP: World of Elarion.
It is fairly easy to use and doesn't cause conflicts with most nickname mods.

/playertitle (PlayerName) title
- eg.: /playertitle Panyel News Reporter

/playertitle clear Panyel or /playertitle Panyel clear to delete the title
